2605.06382.title: Rethinking Vacuity for OOD Detection in Evidential Deep Learning
2605.06382.paper_summary: Vacuity, or Uncertainty Mass (UM), is commonly used as a metric to evaluate Out-of-Distribution (OOD) detection in Evidential Deep Learning (EDL). It generally involves dividing the number of classes ($K$) by the total strength of belief ($S$) of the model's predictions, where $S$ is derived from summing the Dirichlet parameters. As such, UM is sensitive to the cardinality of $K$. In particular, it is unlikely in practice that there is a linear relationship between $K$ and $S$ as $K$ and $S$ increase due to the nature of EDL (suppressing incorrectly assigned evidence). As a result, when comparing In Distribution (ID) and OOD results, it is important that $K_{\mathrm{ID}}$ and $K_{\mathrm{OOD}}$ are equal; something that is not always ensured in practice. We provide an empirical demonstration of how results for AUROC and AUPR can substantially differ when class cardinality between ID and OOD differs by 1, with AUROC differing by as much as 0.318 and AUPR by 0.613 for standard EDL, and AUROC by 0.360 and AUPR by 0.683 for IB-EDL. More concretely, our findings isolate an evaluation artefact: when K differs between ID and OOD, AUROC/AUPR can be artificially inflated without any change in model predictions. We further discuss the evaluation of EDL over causal language models using Multiple-Choice Question-Answer (MCQA) datasets and argue for clearer definitions of ID and OOD in this context. Our primary contribution is an empirical and theoretical demonstration that vacuity-based OOD detection in EDL-fine-tuned LLMs is highly sensitive to uncontrolled differences in evaluated class cardinality.
2605.06382.paper_summary_zh: 虛無性或不確定性質量（UM）通常用作評估證據深度學習（EDL）中的分佈外（OOD）檢測的指標。<lb/>它通常涉及將類別數（$K$）除以模型預測的總信念強度（$S$），其中 $S$ 是通過對 Dirichlet 參數求和得出的。<lb/>因此，UM 對 $K$ 的基數非常敏感。<lb/>特別是，由於 EDL 的特性（抑制錯誤分配的證據），在實際中 $K$ 和 $S$ 之間不太可能存在線性關係，因為 $K$ 和 $S$ 都在增加。<lb/>因此，在比較分佈內（ID）和分佈外（OOD）結果時，確保 $K_{\mathrm{ID}}$ 和 $K_{\mathrm{OOD}}$ 相等是很重要的；這在實際中並不總是能夠保證。<lb/>我們提供了一個實證示範，顯示當 ID 和 OOD 之間的類別基數相差 1 時，AUROC 和 AUPR 的結果可能會有顯著差異，標準 EDL 的 AUROC 差異可達 0.318，AUPR 差異為 0.613，而 IB-EDL 的 AUROC 差異為 0.360，AUPR 差異為 0.683。<lb/>更具體地說，我們的研究結果孤立出一個評估工件：當 K 在 ID 和 OOD 之間存在差異時，AUROC/AUPR 可以在模型預測不變的情況下被人為地膨脹。<lb/>我們進一步討論了在因果語言模型上使用多選題問答（MCQA）數據集對 EDL 的評估，並主張在這種情境下對 ID 和 OOD 的定義要更加清晰。<lb/>我們的主要貢獻是實證和理論上的示範，表明在 EDL 微調的 LLM 中，基於虛無性的 OOD 檢測對於被評估類別基數的無控制差異高度敏感。
2605.06382.author: Claire McNamara et.al.
